name: MenuRoot
description: Root controller for a dropdown menu. Uses native Popover API for top-layer rendering and light dismiss.
whenToUse: Contextual list of actions triggered from a button (more actions, user menu).
avoidWhen: Navigation links - use a nav list. Form selection - use Select.
accessibilityRequirements: MenuContent requires aria-label or aria-labelledby. Arrow keys navigate items.

parts.name: MenuTrigger
parts.description: Element that opens the Menu. Uses native popovertarget attribute.
parts.whenToUse: Always inside a MenuRoot to provide the open trigger.

parts.name: MenuContent
parts.description: Container for MenuItems. Uses native popover attribute.
parts.accessibilityRequirements: Must have aria-label or aria-labelledby (enforced by ModalLabelProps type).

parts.name: MenuItem
parts.description: Single action item in a Menu.
parts.accessibilityRequirements: Must have visible text content or aria-label.

route.label: Menu
route.description: Dropdown action menu with keyboard nav

examples.title: Usage
examples.code:
<sg-menu-root open={menuOpen} oninput={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; menuOpen = (el.open ?? menuOpen); }} onchange={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; menuOpen = (el.open ?? menuOpen); }} onclick={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; menuOpen = (el.open ?? menuOpen); }} ontoggle={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; menuOpen = (el.open ?? menuOpen); }}>
    <sg-menu-trigger>
        <button class="sg-button" data-color="secondary">Open Menu</button>
    </sg-menu-trigger>
    <sg-menu-content>
        <sg-menu-item onselect={() => console.log("Edit")}>Edit</sg-menu-item>
        <sg-menu-item onselect={() => console.log("Copy")}>Copy</sg-menu-item>
        <sg-menu-item onselect={() => console.log("Delete")}>Delete</sg-menu-item>
        <sg-menu-item disabled={true}>Disabled Item</sg-menu-item>
    </sg-menu-content>
</sg-menu-root>

examples.title: Feature Flag
examples.code: Menu machine can be toggled with featureFlags.menuMachine.
